overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a first-person journey on the NCART subway system through a futuristic metropolis. The clip transitions from industrial districts with towering green-accented buildings, through a bustling station platform, past an aerial view of dense cyberpunk skyscrapers, and concludes inside the train car with other passengers.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district viewed from elevated train

events.description: flying vehicle passes by the window moving in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: observing futuristic industrial architecture from the moving train

notable_agents.action: flying car passing by the train window

entered.detail: tall rusted metal structure with green neon accents and diagonal support beams
green holographic text and graphics on the train window
brown rocky hills visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from inside a moving train, looking out at a massive industrial tower with green structural accents. A flying vehicle passes by the window against a clear blue sky, while distant mountains are visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station platform with street vendors

events.description: train arrives at station level, revealing platform and pedestrians

agents.ego_description: passing through the station area and observing pedestrians on the platform

notable_agents.action: vendor standing under umbrella at food stall
woman in dress walking along the platform

entered.detail: blue building with yellow stripe and NCART signage
market stall with striped umbrella and display items
yellow painted markings on the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The train slows as it passes through a station platform area. The blue NCART station facade dominates the view, with a food vendor stall visible on the left. Pedestrians walk along the platform, and yellow graffiti markings cover the concrete ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train corridor transitioning to aerial city view

events.description: train exits enclosed tunnel structure revealing open aerial view of downtown
emerging from shadow into brighter light as train enters open air

agents.ego_description: traveling through enclosed track then emerging to elevated view of cyberpunk cityscape

entered.detail: dark metal walls and grating of the enclosed train tunnel
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows
large glowing advertisements and holographic displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: The train moves through a dark enclosed corridor with metal walls and grating, then bursts out into an open aerial view of the cyberpunk city. Massive skyscrapers with glowing digital billboards fill the frame as the train travels on elevated tracks above the urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway train interior with seated passengers

agents.ego_description: sitting inside the train car observing other passengers and the passing city lights through the window

notable_agents.action: woman with long dark hair and pink pants sitting by the window, resting her head on her hand

entered.detail: grey upholstered bench seats with passengers sitting
green vertical support poles for standing passengers
illuminated signs and displays inside the train car

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to the interior of the train car, showing seated passengers under green neon lighting. A woman with pink pants sits by the window while the train continues moving, with city lights passing by outside. The atmosphere is calm and enclosed compared to the exterior views.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the expansive industrial outskirts of a futuristic city into the intimate, neon-lit interior of a commuter train. It begins with a view from a moving window looking out at a massive green-accented industrial tower and flying vehicles under a clear blue sky. As the train slows, the perspective shifts toward a bustling NCART station platform characterized by a blue facade, food vendors, and yellow graffiti on the concrete. The scene then plunges through a dark, metallic enclosed corridor before bursting back into the open air, revealing a dense skyline of massive skyscrapers and glowing digital billboards. Finally, the camera turns inward to the train car, where the vast urban landscape is replaced by a calm, enclosed atmosphere featuring seated passengers under soft green neon lighting.
